{{Quote|Whenever an exploration party has discovered a new planet, they send data to our research facility on the planet Koaan. Sometimes, it takes months for this data to be studied. And since the Empire took over…|[[Mammon Hoole]]|<ref name="Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger">''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]''</ref>}}
'''Koaan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. It was temperate and had many [[Color/Legends|green]] hills. It was home to the [[Galactic Research Academy]]. Whenever an [[Scout/Legends|exploration party]] discovered a new planet, they sent information to this facility for processing. Under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the processing was greatly slowed down and it was considered by some as a convenient source for uninhabited planets.

The anthropologist, [[Mammon Hoole]], was familiar with the planet from his days working for the Academy, and in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], traveled there with his wards in order to steal the location of an unidentified planet from the databases. However, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had infiltrated their ship and they were forced to abandon ship in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] which crashed on the planet's surface. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], was also visiting the planet for the same purpose and the two groups ended up both traveling to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] from there.

While the planet had had little Imperial presence during the early years of the Empire's reign, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were stationed there during the Rebellion, as part of its initiative to control every scientific facility.
